title: All of The Create Mod
description: All of the Create Mod  is a modpack that enhances the popular Create mod with over 50 add-ons. It lets players build advanced machinery, automate processes, and explore engineering solutions, offering endless creative possibilities for Minecraft.
body:
All of the Create Mod is designed for players who love technical building and automation in Minecraft. At its core is the popular Create mod, which introduces a variety of mechanical systems, tools, and components to build intricate contraptions.

The modpack also includes compatible addons that expand the functionality of Create, allowing for even more complex designs and innovative builds. Whether you’re designing advanced factories, automating resource gathering, or constructing elaborate mechanisms, this modpack encourages creativity and experimentation in engineering.

Dive into the limitless possibilities of All of the Create Mod and transform your Minecraft world with the power of mechanics and automation!
